headline: Largest East Malaysia Military Exercise in 15 Years Held
context: Malaysian Armed Forces conducted Exercise Pasukan Borneo deploying 5,000 troops across Sabah and Sarawak in January 2026.

cards.big: 5,000 troops deployed in largest East Malaysia exercise in 15 years
cards.sub: Exercise Pasukan Borneo tested coastal defence and jungle warfare capabilities

cards.big: Exercise included amphibious landing drills at 4 eastern Sabah coastal points
cards.sub: Scenario simulated response to maritime incursion similar to 2013 Lahad Datu

cards.big: Only 35% of East Malaysia military hardware meets operational readiness
cards.sub: 8 of 12 patrol boats based in Sandakan require maintenance or replacement

cards.big: Defence Ministry allocated RM1.8 billion for East Malaysia military in 2026
cards.sub: New forward operating base in Semporna targets December 2027 operational date

cards.big: Military readiness tests whether defence investment matches the eastern border threat
The largest East Malaysia military exercise in 15 years signals a regional security recalibration.
